name: freeperrylarp1
description: Build evidence-bounded Auralo campaigns from frozen neutral research, independent creative challenge, and copy-first page mapping.

interface.shortDescription: Turn neutral product evidence into one strong sales argument.
interface.longDescription: Keeps Auralo Pheromone Perfume as the fixed paid product while starting every supplied FREE product from a clean campaign contract. It freezes neutral research before ideation, requires isolated connection hypotheses and an independent critic, gives the writer a clean customer-language packet, and maps only accepted finished copy into page sections and image jobs.
defaultPrompt: Build a fresh Auralo plus FREE-product campaign.
Audit this campaign for stale-product leakage.
Validate neutral research and the independent creative decision before writing.
